suites.description: Source inference and YAML overlay compilation coverage.
Hono API surface coverage for the platform foundation.
Runtime smoke command, Railway deploy guard, explicit synthetic operator workflows, and fail-closed runtime selection coverage.

File-backed workspace reconciliation, durable intent decisions, operator-supplied projection observations, sensitivity-scoped accountability counts, explicit report boundary context and denial handling, restart persistence, workspace isolation, local evidence import, watermarks, and private drift-review generation coverage.
Explicit durable/synthetic runtime selector parsing and fail-closed ambiguity coverage.
SQLite repository composition and exact workspace ID/key resolution coverage.
Policy gate coverage for trust tier, delegation stage, approval, and model egress.
Generic due-item planning and exception digest coverage.
External-principal mapping and proactive message delivery contract coverage.
Read-only source adapter, normalized metadata, consent, hash, watermark, and idempotent import contract coverage.
Strategy kernel contracts, visibility inheritance, migrations, and workspace pack reconciliation coverage.
Bun-native SQLite migration application and strategy-kernel repository persistence coverage.
Workspace pack loading, YAML fragment reconciliation, and conflict behavior.
Evidence ingestion, deterministic claim extraction, candidate inbox transitions, and audit events.
Intended projection creation, observation classification, operator-observation persistence semantics, and projection drift findings.
Non-live accountability action transitions, evidence-required completion, silence, escalation, and action-card feedback.
Workspace-scoped strategic report generation, derived drift findings, sensitivity ceilings, and leakage guards.
Tracked-file leakage scanning with invented stdin values and ignored private configuration.
